hero.title: Marketing Research & Communications for the Pharma Industry
hero.description: MDM is part of Proxima Research International — a global leader in healthcare data and technology. For over 25 years we have provided top pharma players in Ukraine and the CIS with expert insights and analytics.

trade.title: Trade Marketing
trade.text: Professional product promotion across pharmacy networks. Inventory analysis, shelf placement control and staff incentive programs.

research.title: Marketing Research
research.text: In-depth study of the healthcare market. Quantitative and qualitative surveys among doctors, patients and pharmacists for precise decision-making.

omnichannel.title: Omnichannel Marketing
omnichannel.text: Building a unified communications ecosystem. We deliver your message via email, messengers and visits at the most convenient time for your audience.

pharmbase.title: Data Synergy: The Largest Medical Specialist Database
pharmbase.description: We combine data from official sources and our own verification centre to ensure maximum accuracy for your marketing campaigns.
pharmbase.verified_label: of specialists have verified mobile numbers

expertise.title: Expertise
expertise.text: 25 years of experience in marketing research. 95% of our clients are leading pharmaceutical companies.

quality.title: Database Quality
quality.text: The most comprehensive and regularly validated HCP and healthcare facility database in Ukraine.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.text: Full business transparency and compliance with ESOMAR, GDPR standards and ethical norms.

contact.title: Effective Reach
contact.text: Deep understanding of target audience needs and communication with doctors in their own language.

service.title: Full Service
service.text: Turnkey project delivery — from strategy to detailed KPI reporting.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.text: Introducing cutting-edge global technologies and tools into pharmaceutical marketing.

cta_section.title: Ready for Effective Pharma Business Solutions?
